LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUED AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANTS SAN FRANCISCO CITY AND COUNTY AND LADRON DURIO AND JAMES MOORE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 AND 2. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3,4,5 AND WRONGFUL DISCHARGE. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO GENERAL HOSPITAL. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR # 8600
